LAW AND MOTION 302,1 - DEFENDANT POLESTAR AUTOMOTIVE USA, INC.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ADMIT PRO HAC VICE COUNSEL MARY T. NOVACHECK IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, COUNSEL MARY T. NOVACHECK MAY APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR MOVING PARTY IN THIS ACTION. IN FUTURE APPLICATIONS, MOVING PARTY AND ITS COUNSEL MUST MIND THE REQUIREMENT TO PROVIDE "[T]HE TITLE OF EACH COURT AND CAUSE IN WHICH THE APPLICANT HAS FILED AN APPLICATION TO APPEAR PHV." (CAL. RULES OF COURT, RULE 9.40(D)(5) THE PARTIES HERE DID NOT IDENTIFY THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

LAW AND MOTION 302, 2 - DEFENDANT POLESTAR AUTOMOTIVE USA, INC.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ADMIT PRO HAC VICE COUNSEL EMILY M. PLUNKETT IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, COUNSEL EMILY M. PLUNKETT MAY APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR MOVING PARTY IN THIS ACTION.ORDER SIGNED.JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
